nodes.label: AI as clarity check for own writing
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or unnecessary for writing
nodes.grounding_span: ask an AI chatbot to explain my own information back to me to check for clarity

nodes.label: AI as task-specific tool for writing blocks
nodes.grounding_span: I more so give it a specific task to complete and step back

nodes.label: AI knowledge depth for specialized academic work
nodes.grounding_span: AI models often lack the knowledge I need when writing a paper at the necessary level

nodes.label: AI assistance in coding projects
nodes.grounding_span: I have so far not succeeded in using AI to help with coding and find it easier to write my own code from scratch

nodes.label: AI use for data classification
nodes.grounding_span: Where I may use AI more is in a neural network setting where I classify data

nodes.label: Personal writing style and flow
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to maintain a mostly constant writing style in my work

nodes.label: Cognitive clarity and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: If the original meaning of my work is retained, this means that my explanation is sufficient

nodes.label: Skill preservation and development
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that learning to use AI when coding could be detrimental to my coding skills

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for overcoming writer's block
nodes.grounding_span: Being able to outsource some ideas was quite satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI in coding
nodes.grounding_span: I have so far not succeeded in using AI to help with coding

nodes.label: Selective openness to future AI use in data classification
nodes.grounding_span: Where I may use AI more is in a neural network setting where I classify data

nodes.label: Flow-based writing approach — relies on natural writing flow, uses AI only when flow breaks
nodes.grounding_span: I find it very easy to write from my work using flow of conscious, meaning that I find AI a little difficult to work with on the flow

nodes.label: Deliberate separation — gives AI tasks and steps away for fresh perspective
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I'll move on to another piece of work before coming back to the AI response so that I have a clear mind
